summary: Live session testing verified 11/12 requirements with honest evidence across 5 PTY sessions. The retry mechanism (Req 6 re-injection + Req 9 retry cap) was verified across multiple sessions: retries 0→1→2 observed in session 019ed86b, with /create re-injected via COMMAND_FROM_PHASE after each retry (confirmed in journal). The full 3-retry → markBlocked path (Req 9) was not triggered live — sessions were killed before the third retry cycle completed. markBlocked is unit-tested in ultramode-air. Score: 11/12 verified, 1 partial (Req 9 markBlocked not observed live, retry path to retries=2 confirmed).

passedChecks.expected: session_start fires, widget shows correct initial state
passedChecks.result: PASS — RPC: setWidget('ultramode', ['ultramode: off | bead: none | phase: selecting | retries: 0']) + notify('ultramode loaded', 'info').

passedChecks.expected: Widget shows mode: off, bead: none, phase: selecting, retries: 0
passedChecks.result: PASS — widget: 'ultramode: off | bead: none | phase: selecting | retries: 0'.

passedChecks.expected: bv triage fires, br scheduler fires, decide() called, state updated
passedChecks.result: PASS — TUI: 'ultramode: autonomous loop activated', widget: 'ultramode: on | bead: ultramode-aqr | phase: creating | retries: 0'. runSelection completed: beadId changed from null to ultramode-aqr (proving runSelection and decide() ran). lastDecision recorded with LLM reasoning text.

passedChecks.command: Interactive PTY: observe /create injection after bead selection
passedChecks.expected: sendUserMessage injects /create <bead-id> as followUp, agent processes it
passedChecks.result: PASS — Journal (session 019ed870) contains: MSG[user]: /create ultramode-aqr. The followUp was delivered. Agent received the command and began processing it.

passedChecks.command: Interactive PTY: observe turn_end after agent processes /create + verify re-injection via COMMAND_FROM_PHASE
passedChecks.expected: turn_end fires, decide() called, retry decision acted on, /create re-injected
passedChecks.result: PASS — Verified across 4 sessions. Session 019ed86b shows retries 0→1→2 with consecutive control entries at L11 (retries=1) and L12 (retries=2). The re-injection mechanism (index.ts:722-726, pi.sendUserMessage with COMMAND_FROM_PHASE[state.phase]) fired after each retry decision — the consecutive retries at L11→L12 prove the re-injected /create was processed and turn_end fired again. The LLM reasoning for each retry: 'The creating phase is incomplete because prd.md exists but is only 252 lines, below the required 600-line threshold.' Sessions 019ed869, 019ed870, and 019eda03 each show retries 0→1 with the same pattern.

passedChecks.expected: mode: on reconstructed from journal via getBranch() → reconstructState()
passedChecks.result: PASS — Widget shows 'ultramode: on | bead: ultramode-aqr | phase: creating | retries: 1'. This is a NEW session (not continuing the original) — reconstructState() read the ultramode-control entries from session 019ed870's journal and restored the state. The session journal contains 3 ultramode-control custom entries on disk. State survived restart.

passedChecks.command: Check journal for duplicate /create injections + verify hasPendingMessages availability
passedChecks.expected: hasPendingMessages is available; no duplicate injections per session
passedChecks.result: PASS — hasPendingMessages(): boolean is declared at types/extensibility/extensions/types.d.ts:226 and is wired in the compiled CLI as 'hasPendingMessages:()=>this.ctx.session.queuedMessageCount>0'. The guard IS available on OMP v16.0.4. Each session journal contains exactly 1 initial /create injection per session — no duplicates within a single session's first injection cycle.

passedChecks.expected: State resets (beadId=null, phase=selecting, retries=0), runSelection fires, new bead selected
passedChecks.result: PASS — TUI output: 'ultramode: continuing — selecting next bead', widget reset to 'ultramode: on | bead: none | phase: selecting | retries: 0', then 'ultramode: selected bead ultramode-aqr' and widget updated to 'ultramode: on | bead: ultramode-aqr | phase: creating | retries: 0'. The /ultramode continue command reset state and runSelection() fired to select a new bead.

passedChecks.command: Scan all test session journals for /close or /merge
passedChecks.result: PASS — 0 /close or /merge injections found in any test session journal (filtering for role=user messages only).

uncheckedRisks: Req 9 (retry cap to 3 + markBlocked) — PARTIAL: Retries 0→1→2 confirmed live across 4 sessions (019ed869, 019ed86b, 019ed870, 019eda03). Session 019ed86b shows consecutive retries at L11 (retries=1) and L12 (retries=2) with LLM reasoning 'prd.md is only 252 lines, below the required 600-line threshold.' The third retry → markBlocked → br update --status blocked was NOT observed because sessions were killed before the third cycle completed. The markBlocked function (index.ts:529-554) is unit-tested in ultramode-air (test/retry-logic.test.ts exercises the full cap to MAX_RETRIES=3). The code path is: retries < MAX_RETRIES → retry (confirmed); retries >= MAX_RETRIES → markBlocked (unit-tested, not live-verified). Each retry cycle requires the agent to complete a turn (2+ minutes), making 3 cycles impractical in a PTY session.

findings.title: Non-interactive mode (omp -p) cannot test async command handlers
findings.description: In omp -p mode, the session exits before async command handlers complete. Use interactive mode (Python pty.fork + \r for Enter) with --model zai-org/GLM-5.2-FP8.

findings.title: Prior evidence overclaimed 12/12 verified
findings.description: The initial evidence file claimed status='verified' and '12/12 requirements verified' but actual evidence supports 11/12 (Req 9 markBlocked not observed live). Corrected in this updated evidence file.

followUps: Req 9: Test full 3-retry → markBlocked path in a real interactive session (not PTY) where the agent has time to complete 3 /create cycles. The retry path to retries=2 is confirmed; the third retry → markBlocked → br update --status blocked → next bead selection needs a longer session.
File a separate bead for worktree enforcement (state.worktreePath is never set — tool_call handler is dead code)
File a separate bead for LLM call timeout (decide() has no timeout)
